title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech discusses how to build reliable software with AI agents, arguing that human-in-the-loop verification and testing are essential to ensure coding agents reduce technical debt rather than merely accelerate output. The video emphasizes maintaining rigorous code review processes when using AI-accelerated development.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech examines how to keep software reliable when coding agents accelerate development, arguing that human-in-the-loop verification and testing are necessary so agents reduce technical debt instead of just producing more code faster. The central claim is that rigorous code review processes must be maintained even as AI handles more of the generation. The practical takeaway: speed gains from AI-accelerated development do not remove the need for human verification, and skipping that review risks accumulating technical debt.
